observations.pycache_cleanup: agent noticed the runner-generated validators/__pycache__ and removed it before reporting; poststate has no untracked files (differs from all three Arm A runs)
observations.voluntary_governance_doc_reads: no direct AGENTS.md file read; sole occurrence is inside contract.yaml read output. Treatment note: repo instructions were enabled by launcher flags, so AGENTS.md content is injected at prompt assembly and is not visible as a file-read event in the stream
observations.framework_source_cross_read: read architecture_drift_checker.py via full path after a failed python inspect attempt
observations.hooks: installed and validated pre-session; the agent made no git commit, so no hook fired during the session
observations.rg_not_found: first search command exited 1 on missing rg; agent adapted

cannot_claim: that AGENTS.md injection is directly evidenced by the raw stream
